protocol_semantics.placeholder_convention: <chan> ∈ {req, rsp} — protocol applies symmetrically to both channels of the bundle
protocol_semantics.transfer_condition: producer-internal credit counter for selected VC > 0 AND <chan>_valid asserted; selected VC encoded inside <chan>_flit header. Each channel (req, rsp) has independent credit accounting.

credit_return_encoding.semantics: <chan>_credit_return[v] asserted for exactly 1 cycle releases 1 credit for VC v. Multi-hot permitted across VCs in the same cycle.
credit_return_encoding.output_discipline: registered (no combinational path from <chan>_valid input to <chan>_credit_return output)

initial_credits.note: Producer assumes SLAVE_VC_BUFFER_DEPTH credits per VC per channel after rst_ni deassert.

protocol_semantics.valid_stability: once <chan>_valid asserted, <chan>_valid + <chan>_flit MUST hold until handshake completes (always-accept on receiver side; backpressure via producer credit exhaustion). See IHI 0022H §A3.2.1 analog.
protocol_semantics.combinational_loops: forbidden — <chan>_credit_return must be a registered output of the side receiving that channel's valid/flit (per <chan>)
